category_sources: Official revive.run docs describe revive as a Go linter and golint replacement with configurable rules.
source_facts.description says revive is a fast, configurable, extensible, flexible linter for Go.
display_name_sources: Official revive.run docs heading uses revive.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is an additional official documentation surface.
Official revive.run docs provide dedicated documentation, rules, guides, and API links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/mgechev/revive, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official revive.run docs describe custom rules, TOML configuration, formatters, and linting behavior.
